description: Dispatch trigger evals. should_fire = a Java->React migration intent (incl. indirect phrasings). should_not_fire = greenfield React, Java-to-Java upgrades, deployment, or unrelated work.

cases.query: rewrite our Java backend UI in React
get our bank app off JSP and onto React
modernize the legacy Spring app to a JS frontend
port these Stripes ActionBeans to a React frontend
convert AccountController.java and account.jsp to React
we want to get off Java for the customer portal
migrate the JSF screens in this app to React components
translate our servlet-based checkout flow into a React SPA
replace our server-rendered Java UI with a JavaScript frontend
turn this legacy Java petstore into a React app
build a new React app from scratch
scaffold a fresh React dashboard, no backend yet
upgrade Spring Boot 2 to 3 in this service
bump the Java version from 8 to 21
deploy the React frontend to production
set up CI/CD for our existing React app
write unit tests for this Java service
explain what this Java controller does
migrate our database from Oracle to Postgres
add a new endpoint to the Spring REST API
